overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit elevated terrace in a futuristic city at night. The character interacts with NPCs and overlooks a busy street below, with prominent holographic advertisements and wet reflective surfaces creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian terrace with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet terrace toward the Fuyutsuki Electronics building, passing seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on a bench conversing near a glass railing

entered.detail: large red neon sign with Japanese text reading 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' on a glass building facade
glowing digital advertisement with cyan and orange graphics
large umbrella-like structure with purple neon edge lighting providing shelter
rain-slicked tiled surface reflecting neon lights in red and purple hues
metal bench with two seated characters near a glowing trash receptacle

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked terrace illuminated by vibrant neon signs. The Fuyutsuki Electronics building dominates the view ahead, while purple-lit canopies and digital billboards line the walkway. Two NPCs sit on a bench to the left as the character walks forward through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area under neon canopy

events.description: ego stops walking and turns to face group of NPCs, initiating conversation with gestures
camera circles around the group during social interaction, shifting perspectives

agents.ego_description: engaging in conversation with a group of three NPCs under the purple canopy, gesturing and moving around them

notable_agents.action: NPC in bright pink jacket conversing and gesturing with the ego character
NPC with spiky blonde hair drinking from a bottle and talking to the group

entered.detail: futuristic curved seating structures with metallic red upholstery
transparent safety barrier with glowing cyan edge lighting overlooking the level below

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a group of three NPCs gathered under a glowing purple canopy. The interaction involves conversation and gestures, with the camera circling the group. The Fuyutsuki sign recedes to the left background as the focus shifts to the social encounter in this sheltered seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace overlook with view of city street below

events.description: moves from covered seating area to open terrace edge overlooking the multi-lane street
stops at railing to look down at traffic and illuminated cityscape below

agents.ego_description: standing at the terrace railing looking down at the street traffic and surrounding glass towers

entered.detail: multi-lane road with moving vehicle light trails visible from the elevated perspective
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents rising from the street level
suspended traffic signals glowing red above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Breaking away from the group, the character moves to the terrace edge, revealing a sweeping view of the multi-lane street below with moving traffic. The perspective shifts from the enclosed canopy to an open overlook surrounded by towering glass buildings with illuminated windows, while the purple canopy recedes from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with vending machines overlooking street

events.description: resumes walking along the terrace edge, passing red vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace edge past vending machines and other pedestrians, with the city street visible to the right

notable_agents.action: NPC in white vest and patterned pants walking ahead along the path

entered.detail: red automated vending unit with glowing product display and interface
large illuminated sign with 'KENDACHI' text in red neon on a building facade

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the terrace, passing a glowing red vending machine and other pedestrians. The Fuyutsuki Electronics sign reappears on the right, while a new 'KENDACHI' sign becomes visible on the left. The walkway runs parallel to the street below, offering continued views of the urban canyon and traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rain-slicked elevated terrace that shifts from an enclosed social space to an expansive urban overlook. It begins on a walkway illuminated by vibrant neon signs and digital billboards, moving past NPCs on a bench toward the imposing Fuyutsuki Electronics building. As the character approaches a group gathered under a glowing purple canopy, the camera circles the social interaction, causing the surrounding architecture to recede into the background. The scene then opens up as the character breaks away from the group and moves to the terrace edge, transitioning from the sheltered seating area to a sweeping view of a multi-lane street and towering glass buildings. Finally, the camera glides further along the walkway past a glowing red vending machine, passing between the Fuyutsuki and KENDACHI signs while maintaining a parallel view of the traffic in the urban canyon below.
